verses.geez: ወተንሥአ ፡ ላባ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወሰዐመ ፡ አዋልዲሁ ፡ ወደቂቆ ፡ ወባረኮሙ ፡ ወተመይጠ ፡ ላባ ፡ ብሔሮ ፡ ወሖረ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban rose up in the morning, and kissed his sons and his daughters, and blessed them; and Laban having turned back, departed to his place.
translations.kjv: And Jacob went on his way, and the angels of God met him.

verses.geez:
ወያዕቆብኒ ፡ ገብአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖቱ ፡ ወነጸረ ፡ በአዕይንቲሁ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ ተዓይነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኅዱረ
                  ፡ ወተራከብዎ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob departed for his journey; and having looked up, he saw the host of God encamped; and the angels of God met him.
translations.kjv: And when Jacob saw them, he said, This is God’s host: and he called the name of that place Mahanaim.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ተዓይነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ወሰመዮ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ብሔር ፡
                  ተዓይን ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said, when he saw them, This is the Camp of God; and he called the name of that place, Encampments.
translations.kjv: And Jacob sent messengers before him to Esau his brother unto the land of Seir, the country of Edom.

verses.geez: ወፈነወ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ሐዋርያ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ኤዶም ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob sent messengers before him to Esau his brother to the land of Seir, to the country of Edom.
translations.kjv: And he commanded them, saying, Thus shall ye speak unto my lord Esau; Thy servant Jacob saith thus, I have sojourned with Laban, and stayed there until now:

verses.geez:
ወአዘዞሙ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ በልዎ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ላባአ ፡
                  ነበርኩ ፡ ወጐንዶይኩ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ።

translations.lxx: And he charged them, saying, Thus shall ye say to my lord Esau: Thus saith thy servant Jacob; I have sojourned with Laban and tarried until now.
translations.kjv: And I have oxen, and asses, flocks, and menservants, and womenservants: and I have sent to tell my lord, that I may find grace in thy sight.

verses.geez:
ወአጥረይኩ ፡ አእዱገ ፡ (ወአግማለ ፡) ወአልህምተ ፡ [ወአባግዐ ፡] ወአግብርተ ፡ ወአእማተ ፡ ወፈነውኩአ ፡ ይዜንውዎ ፡
                  ለእግዚእየ ፡ ዔሳውአ ፡ ከመ ፡ እርከብ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡ በቅድሜከ ፡ አነአ ፡ ገብርከአ ።

translations.lxx: And there were born to me oxen, and asses, and sheep, and men-servants and women-servants; and I sent to tell my lord Esau, that thy servant might find grace in thy sight.
translations.kjv: And the messengers returned to Jacob, saying, We came to thy brother Esau, and also he cometh to meet thee, and four hundred men with him.

verses.geez:
ወገብኡ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ሐዋርያት ፡ እለ ፡ ፈነወ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ሖርነ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ እኁከ ፡
                  ወናሁ ፡ መጽአ ፡ ይትቀበልከ ፡ ወ፬፻ዕደው ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And the messengers returned to Jacob, saying, We came to thy brother Esau, and lo! he comes to meet thee, and four hundred men with him.
translations.kjv: Then Jacob was greatly afraid and distressed: and he divided the people that was with him, and the flocks, and herds, and the camels, into two bands;

verses.geez:
ወፈርሀ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወኀጥአ ፡ ዘይገብር ፡ ወነፈቆ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ዘምስሌሁ ፡ ወአባግዐኒ ፡ ወአልህምተ ፡ ወገብሮሙ
                  ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ትዕይንተ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob was greatly terrified, and was perplexed; and he divided the people that was with him, and the cows, and the camels, and the sheep, into two camps.
translations.kjv: And said, If Esau come to the one company, and smite it, then the other company which is left shall escape.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለእመ ፡ መጽአ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ወቀተላ ፡ ትድኅን ፡ ካልእት ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said, If Esau should come to one camp, and smite it, the other camp shall be in safety.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said, O God of my father Abraham, and God of my father Isaac, the LORD which saidst unto me, Return unto thy country, and to thy kindred, and I will deal well with thee:

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አምላከ ፡ አበዊየ ፡ አምላከ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወአምላከ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ዘይቤለኒ ፡ ሑር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ተወለድከ ፡ ወኣሤኒ ፡ ላዕሌከ ፤

translations.lxx: And Jacob said, God of my father Abraam, and God of my father Isaac, O Lord, thou art he that said to me, Depart quickly to the land of thy birth, and I will do thee good.
translations.kjv: I am not worthy of the least of all the mercies, and of all the truth, which thou hast shewed unto thy servant; for with my staff I passed over this Jordan; and now I am become two bands.

verses.geez:
ያሠኒ ፡ እንከሰ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ወበኵሉ ፡ ጽድቅ ፡ ወርትዕ ፡ ዘገበርከ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ [ለገብርከ ፡] እስመ ፡ በበትርየ ፡
                  ዐደውክዎ ፡ ለዝ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ወይእዜሰ ፡ ኮንኩ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ተዓይነ ።

translations.lxx: Let there be to me a sufficiency of all the justice and all the truth which thou hast wrought with thy servant; for with this my staff I passed over this Jordan, and now I am become two camps.
translations.kjv: Deliver me, I pray thee, from the hand of my brother, from the hand of Esau: for I fear him, lest he will come and smite me, and the mother with the children.

verses.geez:
አድኀነኒ ፡ እምነ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ እኁየ ፡ እስመ ፡ እፈርህ ፡ አነ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ርእስየ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ኢይምጻእ ፡ ወኢይቅትለኒ ፡ ወኢይቅትል ፡ እመ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ውሉዳ ።

translations.lxx: Deliver me from the hand of my brother, from the hand of Esau, for I am afraid of him, lest haply he should come and smite me, and the mother upon the children.
translations.kjv: And thou saidst, I will surely do thee good, and make thy seed as the sand of the sea, which cannot be numbered for multitude.

verses.geez: ወትቤለኒ ፡ ኣሤኒ ፡ ላዕሌከ ፡ ወእገብሮ ፡ ለ[ዘርእከ ፡] ከመ ፡ ኆጻ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ዘኢይትኌለቍ ፡ እምነ ፡ ብዝኁ ።

translations.lxx: But thou saidst, I will do thee good, and will make thy seed as the sand of the sea, which shall not be numbered for multitude.
translations.kjv: And he lodged there that same night; and took of that which came to his hand a present for Esau his brother;

verses.geez: ወቤተ ፡ ህየ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ሌሊት ፡ ወአውጽአ ፡ አምኃ ፡ ዘይወስዱ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ እኁሁ ፤

translations.lxx: And he slept there that night, and took of the gifts which he carried with him, and sent out to Esau his brother,
translations.kjv: Two hundred she goats, and twenty he goats, two hundred ewes, and twenty rams,

verses.geez: ክልኤ ፡ ምእተ ፡ አጣሌ ፡ ወአብሓኰ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ዕሥራ ፡ ወአባግዐ ፡ ፪፻ወአብሓኰ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ [፳] ፤

translations.lxx: two hundred she-goats, twenty he-goats, two hundred sheep, twenty rams,
translations.kjv: Thirty milch camels with their colts, forty kine, and ten bulls, twenty she asses, and ten foals.

verses.geez: ወናቀተ ፡ [፴]ምስለ ፡ እጐሊሆን ፡ [ወ]እጐልተ ፡ [፵]ወአስዋረ ፡ ፲ወአእዱገ ፡ [፳]ወዕዋለ ፡ ፲ ።

translations.lxx: milch camels, and their foals, thirty, forty kine, ten bulls, twenty asses, and ten colts.
translations.kjv: And he delivered them into the hand of his servants, every drove by themselves; and said unto his servants, Pass over before me, and put a space betwixt drove and drove.

verses.geez: ወወሀቦሙ ፡ ለደቁ ፡ መራዕየ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባሕቲቶሙ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ወአስተራሕቁ ፡ መራዕየ ፡ እመራዕይ ።

translations.lxx: And he gave them to his servants each drove apart; and he said to his servants, Go on before me, and put a space between drove and drove.
translations.kjv: And he commanded the foremost, saying, When Esau my brother meeteth thee, and asketh thee, saying, Whose art thou? and whither goest thou? and whose are these before thee?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ለዘ ፡ ቀዳሚ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ረከብኮ ፡ ለዔሰው ፡ እኁየ ፡ ወተስእለከ ፡ ወይቤለከ ፡ ዘመኑ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ወአይቴ ፡
                  ተሐውር ፡ ወዘመኑዝ ፡ ዘየሐውር ፡ ቅድሜከ ፤

translations.lxx: And he charged the first, saying, If Esau my brother meet thee, and he ask thee, saying, Whose art thou? and whither wouldest thou go, and whose are these possessions advancing before thee?
translations.kjv: Then thou shalt say, They be thy servant Jacob’s; it is a present sent unto my lord Esau: and, behold, also he is behind us.

verses.geez: በሎ ፡ ዘገብርከ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ አምኃ ፡ ዘፈነወ ፡ ለእግዚኡ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ውእቱኒ ፡ ድኅሬነ ፡ ይተልወነ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt say, Thy servant Jacob's; he hath sent gifts to my lord Esau, and lo! he is behind us.
translations.kjv: And so commanded he the second, and the third, and all that followed the droves, saying, On this manner shall ye speak unto Esau, when ye find him.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዞ ፡ ለቀዳማዊኒ ፡ ወለካልኡኒ ፡ ወለሣልሱኒ ፡ ወኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ወይነድኡ ፡ መራዕየ ፡
                  ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ በልዎ ፡ ለእኁየ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ ለእመ ፡ ረከብክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he charged the first and the second and the third, and all that went before him after these flocks, saying, Thus shall ye speak to Esau when ye find him;
translations.kjv: And say ye moreover, Behold, thy servant Jacob is behind us. For he said, I will appease him with the present that goeth before me, and afterward I will see his face; peradventure he will accept of me.

verses.geez:
በልዎ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ይበጽሕ ፡ ድኅሬነ ፤ እስመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እድኅን ፡ እምነ ፡ ገጹ ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ አምኃ
                  ፡ ዘይወስዱ ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ እሬኢ ፡ ገጾ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትቄበሎ ፡ ለገጽየ ፡ በዳኅን ።

translations.lxx: and ye shall say, Behold thy servant Jacob comes after us. For he said, I will propitiate his countenance with the gifts going before his presence, and afterwards I will behold his face, for peradventure he will accept me.
translations.kjv: So went the present over before him: and himself lodged that night in the company.

verses.geez: ወእምዝ ፡ ፈነወ ፡ አምኃ ፡ ወውእቱሰ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ሌሊት ።

translations.lxx: So the presents went on before him, but he himself lodged that night in the camp.
translations.kjv: And he rose up that night, and took his two wives, and his two womenservants, and his eleven sons, and passed over the ford Jabbok.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ ወነሥኦን ፡ ለክልኤሆን ፡ አንስቲያሁ ፡ ወለክልኤ ፡ ዕቁባቲሁ ፡ ወዐሠርተ ፡ ወአሐደ ፡ ደቂቆ ፡ ወዐዶወ ፡
                  ማዕዶተ ፡ [ያቦቅ ።]

translations.lxx: And he rose up in that night, and took his two wives and his two servant-maids, and his eleven children, and crossed over the ford of Jaboch.
translations.kjv: And he took them, and sent them over the brook, and sent over that he had.

verses.geez: ወነሥኦሙ ፡ ወዐደወ ፡ ውኂዘ ፡ ወአዕደወ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ንዋይሁ ።

translations.lxx: And he took them, and passed over the torrent, and brought over all his possessions.
translations.kjv: And Jacob was left alone; and there wrestled a man with him until the breaking of the day.

verses.geez: ወተርፈ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ባሕቲቱ ፡ ወተጋደሎ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እስከ ፡ ጸብሐ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob was left alone; and a man wrestled with him till the morning.
translations.kjv: And when he saw that he prevailed not against him, he touched the hollow of his thigh; and the hollow of Jacob’s thigh was out of joint, as he wrestled with him.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይክሎ ፡ አኀዞ ፡ ሥርወ ፡ ሕሩም ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይትጋደሎ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And he saw that he prevailed not against him; and he touched the broad part of his thigh, and the broad part of Jacob's thigh was benumbed in his wrestling with him.
translations.kjv: And he said, Let me go, for the day breaketh. And he said, I will not let thee go, except thou bless me.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈንወኒ ፡ እስመ ፡ ጎሐ ፡ ጽባሕ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢይፌንወከ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢባረከኒ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to him, Let me go, for the day has dawned; but he said, I will not let thee go, except thou bless me.
translations.kjv: And he said unto him, What is thy name? And he said, Jacob.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ መኑ ፡ ስምከ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to him, What is thy name? and he answered, Jacob.
translations.kjv: And he said, Thy name shall be called no more Jacob, but Israel: for as a prince hast thou power with God and with men, and hast prevailed.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢይኩን ፡ እንከ ፡ ስምከ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ዳእሙ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ስምከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስመ ፡ ክህልከ ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወምስለ ፡ እጓለ ፡ እመሕያው ።

translations.lxx: And he said to him, Thy name shall no longer be called Jacob, but Israel shall be thy name; for thou hast prevailed with God, and shalt be mighty with men.
translations.kjv: And Jacob asked him, and said, Tell me, I pray thee, thy name. And he said, Wherefore is it that thou dost ask after my name? And he blessed him there.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ አይድዐኒ ፡ ስመከ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ለከ ፡ ትሴአል ፡ ስምየ ፡ ወባረኮ ፡ በህየ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob asked and said, Tell me thy name; and he said, Wherefore dost thou ask after my name? and he blessed him there.
translations.kjv: And Jacob called the name of the place Peniel: for I have seen God face to face, and my life is preserved.

verses.geez:
ወሰመዮ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ራእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ ርኢክዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ገጸ ፡
                  በገጽ ፡ ወድኅነት ፡ ነፍስየ ፡ (ወገጽየ ።)

translations.lxx: And Jacob called the name of that place, the Face of God; for, said he, I have seen God face to face, and my life was preserved.
translations.kjv: And as he passed over Penuel the sun rose upon him, and he halted upon his thigh.

verses.geez: ወሠረቀ ፡ ፀሓይ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ኀደጎ ፡ ራእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሎቱሰ ፡ ያስዖዝዞ ፡ ክመ ፡ እግሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the sun rose upon him, when he passed the Face of God; and he halted upon his thigh.
translations.kjv: Therefore the children of Israel eat not of the sinew which shrank, which is upon the hollow of the thigh, unto this day: because he touched the hollow of Jacob’s thigh in the sinew that shrank.

verses.geez:
ወበእንተዝ ፡ ኢይበልዑ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውእተ ፡ ሥርወ ፡ ዘአስዖዘዞ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዓወ ፡ እግሩ ፡ እስከ
                  ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ እስመ ፡ አኀዞ ፡ ሥርወ ፡ ሕሩም ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ (ውእቱ ፡ ሥርው ፡ ሕሩም ።)

translations.lxx: Therefore the children of Israel will by no means eat of the sinew which was benumbed, which is on the broad part of the thigh, until this day, because the angel touched the broad part of the thigh of Jacob—even the sinew which was benumbed.
